The emphasis placed on observing changes in breathing patterns over more indirect indicators such as heart rate supports the accuracy of recognizing strenuous breathing as the hallmark symptom.

Agree. **Final Answer:** B Strenuous Breathing Your agreement strengthens our collective understanding by reinforcing the critical role of immediate respiratory observations in identifying potential airway blockages early. Well done! Final
